markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on the content strategy and topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Approved:** The 5 topic clusters were approved, with a key change to test both high-level executive content and tactical phishing content to see which resonates.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2276.0)
  - [**Competitor Analysis Refined:** The competitor analysis will be corrected to reflect Daylight's market view, prioritizing "Premium MDR" and "AI SOC with services" categories.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
  - [**Content Metrics Clarified:** The team will avoid using a single "escalation reduction" percentage, as competitors use inflated numbers that create an unfair comparison.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [**Next Steps Defined:** GrowthX will deliver a calibration article and the full content calendar for review before next week's meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2657.0)

## Topics

### Process & Artifact Feedback

  - [**Problem:** Maya's comments on strategy artifacts disappeared without a clear resolution process.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX will use version control and a change log to show how feedback is implemented.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [**Content Metric Clarification:**](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
      - [**Escalation Reduction:** Avoid using a single percentage (e.g., "90% reduction"). Competitors use inflated numbers (e.g., 99%) for "escalation rate" (investigations vs. customer team handoffs), which is a different metric and creates an unfair comparison.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
      - [**Integration Depth:** Avoid specific percentages (e.g., "90% coverage for WizDefend"). Coverage varies by tool, making a single number misleading.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)

### Competitor Landscape Correction

  - [**Problem:** The competitor analysis was inaccurate, including non-competitors and miscategorizing others.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [**Solution:** Maya will correct the list to ensure the content database is accurate.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [**New Categories:**](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [**Premium MDR:** Expel, Red Canary, ReliQuest.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
      - [**AI SOC with services:** Profit Security.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [**Prioritization:** Maya will tier competitors (Tier 1, 2, etc.) to focus content efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)

### Content Strategy & Topic Clusters

  - [**Goal:** Drive inbound leads and LLM visibility by targeting experts and CISOs.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [**Approach:** A "portfolio approach" mixing educational and bottom-of-funnel content to build topical authority.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)
  - [**Approved Clusters:**](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
    1.  [**MDR & Threat Hunting:** Targets both ICPs; foundational.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
    2.  [**Competitive Comparisons:** Targets both ICPs; high-value "vs." and "best of" content.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
    3.  [**Modern Security Architecture:** Targets first-time buyers; fills a content gap for cloud-native security.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2068.0)
    4.  [**Security Operations Transformation:** Targets both ICPs; frames Daylight's unique story.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2187.0)
  - [**Cluster 5: Security Leadership & Governance**](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2255.0)
      - [**Maya's Concern:** This high-level topic may not drive direct solution-seeking traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2276.0)
      - [**George's Rationale:** Builds executive awareness and thought leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2313.0)
      - [**Decision:** Test both this cluster and a more tactical one (e.g., phishing) to see which resonates.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2419.0)
  - [**Cluster 7:** Pruned from the initial list.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2471.0)

### Off-Page SEO & Technical Audit

  - [**Daylight Activities:** Maya is launching a Reddit effort and an event series ("SOC Innovation Days") on a separate domain.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2842.0)
  - [**GrowthX Support:** GrowthX will provide guidance on how these activities can support the overall SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2940.0)
  - [**New Initiative:** GrowthX will conduct a technical SEO audit of Daylight's site to identify optimization opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=3002.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Maya:**](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2657.0)
      - [Correct and prioritize the competitor list in the shared document.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2657.0)
      - [Deliver the V1 calibration article for review before the next meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2671.0)
      - [Deliver the full content calendar (30–50 article assignments) for review before the next meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2719.0)
      - [Set up Daylight on the GrowthX dashboard (Google Analytics, Search Console, AI visibility platform).](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2814.0)
      - [Conduct a technical SEO audit of Daylight's website.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=3002.0)
      - [Prepare guidance on how Daylight's off-page activities can support the SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/KD-8YxkszpAE4fGczyfB8K1SZxNePWKP?tab=summary&timestamp=2940.0)
